name: Credex Auto Title Loans
description_short: Credex Auto Title Loans provides fast cash loans based on vehicle equity in South Florida, requiring only a clear car title and valid ID with no credit score requirement.
description_long:
Credex Auto Title Loans is a local lending company based in South Florida that has operated for over 20 years, primarily serving Miami-Dade, Broward, and West Palm Beach counties, with additional Central Florida locations. The company specializes exclusively in car title loans—short-term loans secured by vehicle equity rather than creditworthiness, allowing borrowers to access cash quickly while retaining vehicle use.

Credex offers title-based cash loans up to $5,000 (based on vehicle appraisal), with repayment terms ranging from 6 to 24 months and advertised low APRs. Their application process is streamlined: borrowers provide a vehicle title or registration, government-issued ID, and proof of income. The company emphasizes same-day or rapid approval and same-day funding with minimal paperwork. They operate multiple physical locations and offer application methods including online, phone (855-527-3339), and in-person visits.

Credex distinguishes itself through its regional focus and long operational history in South Florida. The company explicitly markets to consumers with poor or no credit history, positioning equity-based lending as an alternative to traditional credit assessment. Customer testimonials emphasize professional service, quick processing, and lack of aggressive sales tactics. The company includes prominent anti-scam warnings on its website, cautioning customers that legitimate loans require no advance payment.

As a title loan provider, Credex serves consumers in immediate financial need but presents inherent risks: title loans carry high APRs typical of the category, create default risk of vehicle repossession, and may trap borrowers in debt cycles if unable to repay. The 6-24 month repayment window is relatively consumer-friendly within the title loan industry, but the underlying product structure—collateralizing essential transportation—remains high-risk for vulnerable borrowers.
address: 4636 S Orange Blossom Trl, Orlando, FL 32839

company_info.headquarters: 4636 S Orange Blossom Trl, Orlando, FL 32839

pros: No credit score required; loans based solely on vehicle equity
Rapid approval and same-day funding without extensive paperwork
Allows borrowers to keep and drive their vehicle while repaying
Flexible repayment terms from 6 to 24 months (longer than typical title loans)
Advertised low APRs relative to title loan industry standards
20+ years of local operating history in South Florida market
Multiple application channels: online, phone, and in-person locations
Explicit anti-fraud warning and clear policy against advance fees
cons: Title loans carry inherently high APRs and fees typical of the secured short-term lending category
Default results in vehicle repossession, risking loss of essential transportation
Service area limited to South and Central Florida; not available nationwide
Loan amounts capped around $5,000, insufficient for major financial emergencies
May create debt cycles if borrowers struggle to repay within 6-24 month window
best_for: Florida residents with vehicle equity who need immediate cash and have poor or no credit history
Borrowers facing urgent short-term financial needs (medical, repairs, bills) who can repay within 6-24 months
Consumers who own their vehicle outright or have significant equity and prefer not to risk repossession
diagnosis: Credex Auto Title Loans is designed for Florida consumers in immediate financial crisis who own a vehicle with clear title but lack traditional credit access. The primary caveat is that title loans—while faster and more accessible than credit-based alternatives—carry significant risk of vehicle repossession and high cost relative to other emergency funding options; borrowers should exhaust alternatives (credit cards, personal loans, community assistance) before using vehicle equity as collateral.
services: Auto title loans up to $5,000 based on vehicle appraisal
Quick online application with instant quote tool
In-person applications at multiple South and Central Florida locations
Same-day funding upon approval and contract signing
Flexible repayment plans from 6 to 24 months
SMS alert notifications for application status
